entities.driver: a driver gripping the steering wheel

scenes.title: The Traffic Jam
scenes.background_prompt: A city street packed with cars bumper to bumper, traffic lights showing red, buildings on both sides, and a crosswalk. Dull overcast light. No people visible from this angle, no visible car interiors.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A city street in dull overcast light. A car — a silver sedan — is stuck in a long line of bumper-to-bumper traffic. Through the windshield, the driver is visible: a man in a white dress shirt with the sleeves rolled up, gripping the steering wheel with both hands so tightly his knuckles are pale. His face is contorted with frustration — brows furrowed deeply, mouth pressed into a hard line, eyes glaring at the line of brake lights stretching ahead. On the dashboard, a phone shows a navigation app with a sea of red indicating heavy traffic. The clock on the dashboard reads 8:47 AM. Other cars pack the lanes in both directions. Traffic lights ahead glow red. Tall office buildings line both sides of the street. A pedestrian crosswalk is just visible ahead, empty.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place driver in the car (visible through windshield), gripping the steering wheel with both hands, knuckles pale, face contorted with frustration. Place car in a long line of bumper-to-bumper traffic.
